title: vercel-app Asset
description: Schema for the vercel-app asset format consumed by the Joule Studio runtime deployer. v0-generated frontend apps are persisted as `vercel-app` assets. Files synced from v0 land at the root of `assets/<asset-name>/` (e.g. `assets/<asset-name>/app/page.tsx`, `assets/<asset-name>/package.json`); `container.buildPath` is therefore always `.`.

name.description: Identifying name in kebab-case. Modifying this after deployment causes breaking changes (URLs of the deployed asset).

container.description: Container configuration the deployer uses to build and run the Vercel app.

buildPath.description: Path to the buildable application root, relative to the asset directory. Always `.` for vercel-app — v0-synced files (package.json, app/, components/, …) live directly under `assets/<asset-name>/`, not in a `src/` subdirectory.

port.description: Port the app listens on inside the container.
